---
title: "title_header"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd) | [View source](https://codeberg.org/usrbinr/stwd/src/branch/main/R/stwd.R#L830)

# `title_header()`

Create a Large Title Block (Deprecated)

## Usage

```r
title_header(
  title,
  subtitle = NULL,
  title_size = 8,
  subtitle_size = 4,
  halign = "left"
)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `title` | Main title text (marquee-formatted). |
| `subtitle` | Optional subtitle text (marquee-formatted). |
| `title_size` | Size for title. Default: 8. |
| `subtitle_size` | Size for subtitle. Default: 4. |
| `halign` | Horizontal alignment. Default: "left". |

## Value

A ggplot object.

## Description

Use `title_block()` and `subtitle_block()` instead for more control.
